micro-mind (qwen25-1.5b-instruct @ ctx=8192) — /help for commands
cwd: /Users/michaeltimpe/Downloads/micro-mind
▸ read_file path="README.md"
  └ ok 0ms 8262 bytes

micro-mind is a Claude Code-style interactive development REPL powered by `qwen25-1.5b-instruct` via `llama-server`. It supports reading files and executing tool blocks for quick prototyping and experimentation with the model.
